title: pleuropteropyrum tripterocarpum
intro: Pleuropteropyrum tripterocarpum is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain a compound called tigliane diterpene ester, a toxic glycoside that has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antitumor properties. The health benefits associated with Pleuropteropyrum tripterocarpum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an anti-cancer agent. Traditional herbal preparations involving this plant include decoctions and infusions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues, but caution is advised due to its toxic nature.
